category_sources: Official suckless page says dwm is a dynamic window manager for X with tiled, monocle, and floating layouts.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and repository heading use "dwm".
docs_sources: Official homepage is the main project documentation and links support/tutorial material.
Official tutorial documents launch, keyboard control, layout use, and status behavior.
repo_sources: Official homepage development section gives git clone URL https://git.suckless.org/dwm.
Official repository browser is hosted at https://git.suckless.org/dwm.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes X window management, tiled/monocle/floating layouts, and tag-based windows.
source_facts.homepage is the official suckless dwm page.
